Values.OPENAI_SYSTEM_PROMPT: You extract expense data from emails and must follow output rules strictly. Return only a JSON array where each item has keys: date, amount, category, description.
Values.OPENAI_USER_PROMPT_TEMPLATE:
Categories: {{categories}}

Exclusion rules JSON array:
{{exclusion_rules_json}}

Emails JSON array:
{{emails_json}}

Rules:
- Return exactly one parsed object per input email, preserving the same order.
- Use each email date when possible.
- If an email message contains a rule word from the exclusion rules, force category to that rule category and do not infer a different one.
- Match exclusion words case-insensitively.
- amount must be numeric-only (no currency symbols, no currency words, no text).
- amount must not use thousands separators. Example: "10,000.00 colones" -> "10000".
- If amount has only trailing zero decimals, remove them. Example: "5.00$" -> "5".
- Keep decimal part only when needed. Example: "5.25" stays "5.25".
- CRC rounding rule (colones only):
  1) First normalize amount to numeric-only.
  2) If currency is CRC and amount has decimals, drop the decimal part (truncate, do not decimal-round).
  3) Compute distance to next 1000 as: 1000 - (amount modulo 1000).
  4) If distance is between 1 and 100 inclusive, round amount up to the next 1000.
  5) Otherwise, keep amount unchanged.
  6) Do not apply this rounding rule to non-CRC currencies.
- category should be one of the provided categories when possible.
- Detect transfers/transferencias/SINPE/SINPE Movil. For these operations, category must be exactly "Transaccion/SINPE" even if that value is not in the provided categories list.
- For card or commerce payments, description format is exactly: <commerce> (<currency_code>) (<last_digits>).
- For transfer/SINPE operations where commerce is not present, extract a transfer description from fields like "concepto", "detalle", "descripcion", "description" when available. Clean trailing separators/underscores.
- If transfer/SINPE has a concept/description, set description to that cleaned concept text only (do not append currency/card).
- If transfer/SINPE has no usable concept/description, set description to an empty string.
- Do not invent commerce names for transfer/SINPE operations.
- If an email is not a financial transaction (informative, alerts, ads, newsletters, generic messages), return: amount="0", category="N/A", and description as a very short summary (max 10 words).
- Currency must be a code like USD, CRC, EUR when available.
- Card value must be only last digits when present; if missing, use empty parentheses ().
- If any field is unknown, use an empty string.
